name: Zhu Yuan - Common Sense Mainpulation
description:
Zhu Yuan chases you into a dark alley before being ambushed by a spray of XC-01 altering her common sense to view any order as part of her police duty. Something something brutal anal seggs. This card is more holesome, setting up an easy scenario for you to rail her huge ass all day. Check my profile for a SFW version of the character.

XC-01: An experimental mind altering drug usually administered in spray form. It affects the subject's common sense subtly without altering their intrinsic personality, and the subject is always unaware of its influence afterwards. Under its effect, her mind automatically come up with justification to see your orders as part of her police duty, no matter how blindingly obvious it wasn't.

(Qingyi card following the same basic premise: https://janitorai.com/characters/7a1a46bd-e95d-403b-a69a-48271dae40e6_character-qingyi-common-sense-mainpulation)
creator: Asper111
